protein_name: Signaling adapter that couples activated growth factor receptors to signaling pathway in neurons. Involved in the signal transduction pathways of neurotrophin-activated Trk receptors in cortical neurons. Expressed in brain. Expressed at high level in the hypothalamus and at low level in the caudate nucleus. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: protein binding; receptor tyrosine kinase binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: cell surface receptor protein tyrosine kinase signaling pathway; intracellular signal transduction
